title: Win or lose the video in the first minute
principle: The first minute is the single most important part of the video — retention is won or lost there. Over-invest in it relative to every other segment.
rule: Open by immediately paying off the thumbnail/title promise with maximum visuals, motion, music and quick scene changes; no slow throat-clearing intro. Treat any first-minute drop-off as a top-priority defect.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
source.quote: we freak out so much about the first minute and go so above and beyond to make it the best we freakin can
